# Strava Mcp
Unofficial local-first Strava MCP server for AI training and performance agents.
Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/strava-mcp
Homepage: https://wellness.delx.ai/connectors/strava
NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/strava-mcp-unofficial
Primary command: npm exec --yes --package=strava-mcp-unofficial -- strava-mcp-unofficial doctor
MCP command: strava-mcp-unofficial
Agent surfaces:
- MCP registry name: io.github.davidmosiah/strava-mcp
- Start with the connection/status or agent-manifest surface when available.
- Prefer JSON responses for automation and markdown responses for human summaries.
Safety:
- Do not paste credentials, OAuth tokens, refresh tokens, API keys or raw private exports into chat.
- Keep local config and generated data out of git.
- Treat outputs as operational context, not medical, legal or financial advice unless the repo explicitly supports that domain.
